EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Host {object.name} is being updated on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
Failed to activate host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
Host {object.name} is being activated on host {event_src.host}
Failed to update host {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
